headerDisplay:
Homebridge plugin for PETLIBRO smart pet devices.

**Important:** PETLIBRO only allows one session per account. If you keep the PETLIBRO mobile app signed in alongside Homebridge, the plugin will be silently logged out (and vice versa). The recommended setup is to **create a dedicated PETLIBRO account just for Homebridge** and share your devices to it from your primary account.

Review [Account Management](https://github.com/jjjonesjr33/petlibro/wiki/PetLibro-Account-Management) and [Password Limitations](https://github.com/jjjonesjr33/petlibro/wiki/PetLibro-Password-Limitation) for caveats.

email.title: PETLIBRO Account Email
email.description: Email address used to log in to PETLIBRO. Strongly recommended to be a dedicated account, not your primary one.

password.title: PETLIBRO Account Password
password.description: Use a unique password for this dedicated account. Stored in your Homebridge config file and MD5-hashed before being sent to the PETLIBRO API.

region.title: Region
region.description: Only the US region is currently supported. EU and AU support is planned for a future release.

pollIntervalSeconds.title: Poll Interval (seconds)
pollIntervalSeconds.description: Fast-tier polling cadence for live state (food level, online status, etc.). Slow-tier endpoints refresh every 5 minutes regardless. After any user action, polling temporarily speeds up to 15 seconds for 2 minutes.

manualFeedPortions.title: Manual Feed Portions
manualFeedPortions.description: Number of portions to dispense when the Feed Now switch is triggered. 1 portion is roughly 1/12 cup on standard Granary feeders.

desiccantCycleDays.title: Desiccant Cycle (days)
desiccantCycleDays.description: How many days a fresh desiccant pack lasts. Used to calculate the filter life percentage shown in the Eve app and similar HomeKit clients.

enabledServices.title: Enabled HomeKit Services
enabledServices.description: Choose which services appear as tiles in the Home app. Battery is always included. Disable services you don't need to reduce tile clutter. For a minimal setup, try just Feed Now, Food Low, and Feeding Schedule.

debug.title: Debug Logging
debug.description: Enable verbose debug logs. Useful when reporting issues.

layout.title: HomeKit Services
layout.description: Select which services to expose in the Home app. Battery is always included.
